case_title: KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. A CORPORATION VS. DAVID RAYNAL et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-05-2010 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. A CORPORATION'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED AS THE APPLICATION DOES NOT ADEQUATELY DESCRIBE THE PROPERTY OF A NATURAL PERSON WHICH IS TO BE ATTACHED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P SECTION 437 (C) IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN ALTERNATIVELY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY REYNAL DECLARATION. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR # 4819 =301/PHA

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Perkiss, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc.
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. A CORPORATION's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $11,204. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Set For Trial On Aug-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right Attach Order, Application
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. A CORPORATION's Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied as the application does not adequately describe the property of a natural person which is to be attached. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
